title: Multi Chat Windows
description: Allows to add customizable Chat Tabs in Mc
body:
# Custom Chat tabs

**Custom Chat tabs** allows you to add customizable chat tabs/windows to Minecraft.

## Use cases

- Filter messages from specific players, for example friends, into a separate chat window on large servers
- Split chat into multiple tabs based on words, players, or custom rules
- Add timestamps, notifications, and message stacking to improve chat readability

## Features

### Custom Chat Tabs

Create multiple chat tabs/windows that:

- can be configured individually for each server
- use dependencies/rules to decide when a message should appear in a specific tab
- can be customized visually, including opacity, outline, position, size, and text scale
- keep a session chat cache, allowing you to switch servers without instantly losing previous chat messages

### Chat Filtering

- Filter chat based on words or player names
- Enable or disable individual or all filters

### Timestamps

- Add timestamps to chat messages
- Customize timestamp format and color

### Notifications

- Set up notifications for specific messages
- having custom sounds for each notification

### Copy Menu

- Copy Messages to clipboard

### Chat Stacking

- Stack repeated messages into a single line to msg (*2), 3 etc

## Configuration
- Config Menu using cloth config, with the ability to set a background image
## Languages

Currently supported languages:

- en_us
- de_de

## Compatibility

This mod will probably not work together with some other chat-based mods

If you find an incompatibility, bug, or unexpected behavior, please report it on GitHub

## Development

This mod is AI-Coded, which takes its time so:
Bug reports, feedback, and forks are welcome on GitHub

Planned features can be found in features.md

## Inspired by

- LabyMod
- TabbyChat
- Chat Patches
